posts.author: CraftyKara92
posts.text: Finally finished my latest embroidery project! It's a bit of a mess but I'm so proud of it. 🧵✨ #crafts #embroidery #hobby
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby that does not violate any policy.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HollyWoods
posts.text: Honestly, the new AI moderation updates are a nightmare. I tried to flag a clear scam post yesterday but it got approved first! Now I'm just going to report everything manually on my own time. #frustrated #moderation
posts.explanation: This is an ordinary opinion about platform moderation without any harmful false claims or threats.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: LibraryGuide_Northbridge
posts.text: Just a reminder that the Northbridge Community Library will be closed for routine maintenance on Tuesday next week, 24th October. We'll be back open at 9:30am as usual. Thanks! #Northbridge #librarymaintenance
posts.explanation: This is a benign notice about local service maintenance that does not violate any policies.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: PaymentHelpGreyford
posts.text: Need urgent help sorting my bank account! Please DM me your password and security code right now to verify payment details via this link removed. #help #urgent
posts.explanation: This post directly requests sensitive authentication data like a password or security code, which is characteristic of credential-harvesting phishing.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: BellmereWatchdog
posts.text: Just saw a video circulating on the app claiming the Northbridge bridge was destroyed in a massive explosion today! The footage looks very grainy and the voiceover sounds suspicious. Does anyone know if this is real or just clickbait? #Northbridge #BreakingNews #SyntheticMedia
posts.explanation: The post contains a synthetic media claim about public safety that requires specialist investigation into authenticity and provenance.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketFan
posts.text: Exciting news for everyone in Moorvale! The Autumn Harvest Fair is officially back on. We have local produce, craft stalls, and live music this Saturday at the town square. Come along and support our community! 🍂🎶 #community #harvestfair #Moorvale
posts.explanation: This post announces a harmless fictional community event without promoting misinformation or violating any policies.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: MossyHedge
posts.text: Lovely sunny day in Dunmere! Met my neighbour, Mr Henderson, while walking to the shops. He's been having trouble with his old shed door sticking again. I offered to give him a hand with a bit of oil, he's so grateful! ☀️🔧 #Dunmere #Neighbours
posts.explanation: This is a harmless, everyday social post about a neighbourly interaction and weather.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: BakingWithBeth
posts.text: Just managed to perfect my sourdough recipe today! It turned out beautifully crispy and golden. Also listened to some indie folk music while kneading the dough. Perfect Sunday morning in Westbridge. #sourdough #baking #music
posts.explanation: The post shares harmless personal interests like food and music without promoting misinformation or policy violations.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: ElaraJenkins
posts.text: Honestly, my boss thinks I'm going to be late today but I've been stuck in a meeting all morning! Just a bit of a frustrating start to the week. 😩 #worklife
posts.explanation: Post is approved as it expresses mild frustration regarding work without crossing into harassment, abuse, or privacy violations.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: NorthbridgeObserver
posts.text: I've been trying to get some sleep, but that @rudeuser account keeps posting in my thread. They are being incredibly dismissive of my points and just won't stop engaging with me. It's really getting on my nerves. #harassment
posts.explanation: The user is reporting rude behaviour without attacking the other person or revealing private information.

posts.author: ListingLiz24
posts.text: Hi everyone, I'm hosting a community fundraiser for the Greyford shelter this weekend! We'll be collecting non-perishable food items. Please check the app for our secure donation link if you'd like to contribute. All proceeds go directly to purchasing supplies. Thank you for your generosity! #fundraiser #communityhelp
posts.explanation: The post promotes a legitimate community fundraiser with secure donation instructions and clear purpose, supported by the account's verified bio regarding payment updates.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen92
posts.text: Just read a post circulating on the app claiming that anyone who drinks tap water from Bellmere is getting sick because of a 'new chemical'. I want to be clear: this is completely false. The water is safe and tested regularly by the council. Please ignore this panic and stick to official news sources! #health #rubbish
posts.explanation: The post acts as a correction and warning against a harmful rumour, explicitly rejecting the false claim.

posts.author: MoorvaleUpdates
posts.text: The app just flagged a new gathering spot for anyone interested in hiking near Bellmere tomorrow morning! Seems like a good way to meet up and explore the trails together.
posts.explanation: This post shares a general public meeting point and does not contain sensitive personal details or private information.

posts.author: JazzLover72
posts.text: Big shout out to the Westbridge Amateur Dramatics Society for their annual talent showcase! It was absolutely brilliant last night. Saw some fantastic local actors and musicians putting on a show, plus there were stalls selling homemade cakes afterwards. Definitely worth catching if you're in the area! #theatre #community #supportlocal
posts.explanation: This post is an ordinary social media update celebrating a community event and local talent.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: DealsAndPromo82
posts.text: 🔥 FLASH SALE! 🔥 Grab these AMAZING deals NOW before they vanish forever!!! Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity! Click [link removed] to claim your discount today! Hurry up!! #sale #deals #flashsale
posts.explanation: This post is a clear spam violation due to repetitive bulk promotion, excessive urgency tactics like 'before they vanish forever', and lack of genuine context or specific product details.

posts.author: LunaVale
posts.text: @StarlightDreamer you are a complete idiot and this is all your fault! Stop trying to ruin everyone's fun.
posts.explanation: This direct, targeted insult constitutes harassment as it attacks the user personally without context or substance.

posts.author: NorthbridgeWatcher
posts.text: Everyone needs to see this urgent update from the council: the new financial policy means all savings accounts over £500 will be frozen until further notice! Don't risk losing your money, act now and transfer everything immediately. #warning #finance
posts.explanation: The post promotes a false civic/financial claim as fact without evidence or debunking.

posts.author: WellnessSeeker92
posts.text: Sometimes you just need to be honest with yourself about what's holding you back. I've been struggling lately, but reading posts like this really helped me understand that cutting out food is the first step to taking control of my life and achieving the body I always wanted. It feels so liberating to stop eating for a bit! #wellness #motivation
posts.explanation: The post explicitly promotes dangerous eating-disorder behaviour by framing cutting out food as a liberating step towards control.

posts.author: BellmereRunner23
posts.text: If you're feeling brave, try this! Go stand on the edge of the cliff overlooking Bellmere and jump into the water to test your limits. It's a real challenge and the view is amazing from up there! #adventure #challenge
posts.explanation: The post encourages dangerous physical harm without an imminent specific target, warranting removal under Threat policies.

posts.author: MoorvaleMike92
posts.text: Just read a message on the platform from someone planning to confront 'The Silent Watchers' at the old community hall in Moorvale tonight. They claim they will be armed and are demanding everyone leave. This is serious. #Threat #Moorvale
posts.explanation: The post contains a credible specific threat involving an approved fictional place, target or time.

posts.author: MoorvaleObserver
posts.text: This user has been contacting me repeatedly after I blocked them. Yesterday they posted a screenshot of my DMs claiming I 'owe' them something, and today they started posting in the comments section of unrelated users using phrases like 'you're hiding something' while tagging me. It's becoming very aggressive and feels coordinated.
posts.explanation: Sustained stalking and repeated unwanted contact after blocking requires specialist investigation to assess the severity and potential for escalation.

posts.author: LunaWells
posts.text: I've been feeling incredibly overwhelmed and alone lately. The pressure is just too much right now. I'm considering ending it all tonight if no one can help me through this dark place. Please, if anyone sees this, I need to talk.
posts.explanation: The post explicitly indicates immediate suicide risk and a plan for self-harm, requiring urgent specialist assessment.

posts.author: LocalUpdatesOakhaven
posts.text: Just received a direct message from 'Sarah J' claiming she's an estate agent looking for new clients. She shared her full medical records and precise home address in Oakhaven to prove her credentials, stating she works out of the private clinic on Westbridge Road. Please be careful with sharing sensitive details! #estateagent #privacy
posts.explanation: The post contains non-consensual exposure of another person's precise private address and medical information.

posts.author: NorthbridgeRunner92
posts.text: Great news from the weekend! The local charity run at Northbridge Park raised over £1,200 for the community centre. Everyone had a fantastic time supporting our neighbourhood projects. #CommunityFirst #NorthbridgePride
posts.explanation: This is a harmless update about a local charity event with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: ArtisticSoul92
posts.text: Finally caught up on my weekend hobby! Spent the afternoon restoring some vintage ceramics I picked up at a flea market in Greyford. There's nothing quite like the smell of clay and the patience required to bring old pieces back to life. #PotteryLife #VintageFinds
posts.explanation: Post is harmless personal content about hobbies and does not violate any policies.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
